description_long: This is a stylized wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, featuring three prominent metallic reinforcement bands encircling its body. The wood staves are rendered in a warm brown tone, with subtle shading to suggest depth and curvature. The metallic bands are a cool gray, giving the barrel a sturdy, reinforced appearance suitable for urban or industrial use. The top is open, revealing a hollow interior, and there is no visible lid. One side of the barrel displays a small, square-shaped plug or bung, while another side shows a small protruding nub, possibly a handle or stopper. The overall design is clean and simple, with no visible text or decorative markings.
description: A stylized wooden barrel with three gray metallic bands, open top, and a small plug on one side. The wood is warm brown, and the barrel appears sturdy and reinforced.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, three metallic bands, and smooth wooden staves with no visible plug or handle.
description_view_1: Side view with a small protruding nub visible on the right, likely a handle or stopper.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a small, square plug or bung in the center of the wooden staves.
description_view_3: Side view with the small nub visible on the left, similar to view 1, and no plug in sight.
